doc: Nestable tone + space send effect (ADR-0034/0038): a lowpass into a Freeverb, exposed through interface pipes so a host patch uses it as one node. Boundary: `in` (audio), `tone` (a swept cutoff pipe), `space` (the reverb-mix Value pipe) in; `out` (audio, fed from the reverb) out. Display labels/widgets live in a surface doc, not on pipes (ADR-0043). Each input pipe declares its own type and engine-enforced range (ADR-0038 §2) — `tone` keeps the filter cutoff's full 20..20000 Hz range, matching what the v1 boundary enforced; consumers wire from it (`{"from": "/tone"}`).

nodes.doc: Tone control: gentle lowpass ahead of the reverb.
Freeverb tail; `mix` is the boundary's `space` input.
